creator: sylvio@FreeBSD.org
text:
Please, fix this problem.

http://people.freebsd.org/~sylvio/avida-2.12.3.log

And Makfile is wrong too.

DISTVERSIONSUFFIX appears out-of-order.

order must be PORTNAME/PORTVERSION/DISTVERSIONPREFIX/DISTVERSION/DISTVERSIONSUFFIX/PORTREVISION/PORTEPOCH/CATEGORIES/MASTER_SITES/MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR/PROJECTHOST/PKGNAMEPREFIX/PKGNAMESUFFIX/DISTNAME/EXTRACT_SUFX/DISTFILES/DIST_SUBDIR/EXTRACT_ONLY.

If you use ".include <bsd.port.pre.mk>" the end file must be ".include
<bsd.port.post.mk>"
